title: Agent Strategy Manager
requirements_met: Strategic advisor / relationship management: 6 yrs founder-facing at Minima building partnerships, investor and community relationships
Deployment / project execution: ran GTM, presale, ambassador programmes end-to-end across multiple workstreams
AI industry expertise: actively building AI agents with Claude Code, deep current AI context
Cross-functional work with product/eng: coordinated dev, marketing, ops at early-stage startup
Outstanding communication: PR (2M views), content (40K followers), keynotes/investor comms
gaps: No direct enterprise customer success / SaaS deployment management track record (customers like Avis, Cash App, Chime are large enterprises)
In-office company (London) - fine for Ryan but no remote flexibility
preferred_met: Thrives in fast-paced 0-1 environment laying groundwork for a new function
Polymath / generalist orientation matches Decagon's stated values

preferred_skills.calculation: 20 * (2/2) = 20 (no separate hard preferred list; full credit)

experience_fit.calculation: Mid-level 8 yrs vs 'Manager' role expecting some enterprise CS depth; strong generalist but enterprise-deployment depth partial

industry_match.calculation: Agentic AI (top-choice category) - conversational AI agents platform

location_match.calculation: London in-person; Ryan open to London hybrid/in-person

notes: Decagon: leading conversational AI agent platform (Avis, Cash App, Chime, Oura). Backed by a16z, Accel, Bain Capital Ventures, Coatue, Index Ventures. In-office London. Agentic AI = Ryan's top-choice category. Different role from prior-tracked Decagon Implementation Strategist.

must_haves.req: 4+ yrs customer-facing in a technical AND customer-facing role in B2B SaaS
must_haves.note: Ryan has 4.4 yrs founder/investor/community-facing at a crypto protocol, but NOT classic B2B SaaS enterprise customer-facing/deployment work. This is the core gate.

must_haves.req: Proven experience managing large customers + driving highly visible multi-stakeholder projects
must_haves.note: Ran large multi-workstream programmes (presale, ambassador, node-runner) and investor relationships, but not enterprise customer accounts like Avis/Chime/Cash App.

must_haves.req: Excellent communication; simplify complex concepts for non-technical audiences
must_haves.note: PR (2M views, Bloomberg/Yahoo), 40K X following, keynotes, investor comms — clear strength.

must_haves.req: Business understanding of GTM sales teams and processes
must_haves.note: Led GTM, positioning, messaging end-to-end at Minima.

must_haves.req: Strong technical acumen + passion for agent-building (ability to code NOT required)
must_haves.note: Explicitly no coding needed; Ryan actively builds AI agents with Claude Code — strong agent-building passion signal.

hard_blockers: No B2B SaaS enterprise customer-success / deployment track record — the listing's primary background requirement. Community-led/investor-facing growth is adjacent, not the same as managing enterprise SaaS accounts through deployment.
met_strengths: Agent-building fluency (Claude Code) directly matches 'passion for the agent building process'
Strategic-advisor / relationship orientation from founder-facing GTM
London-based, in-office friendly; UK work auth fine (English-only variant)
Polymath/0-1 generalist explicitly matches Decagon's stated values
interview_match.one_line_verdict: No SWE gate (coding explicitly not required) and excellent comms + agent-building fit, but the 4+ yrs B2B SaaS enterprise-customer-facing requirement is a genuine partial gate — a credible stretch where his agent fluency and GTM story carry the application.
